# Alhambra Parc Coral Gables

Alhambra Parc is an exclusive luxury residential development nestled in the heart of Coral Gables, Florida. Designed by Bellin Pratt & Fuentes Architects, this Mediterranean-style condominium offers 78 meticulously crafted residences ranging from one to three bedrooms, with sizes spanning 858 to 2,801 square feet. Residents will enjoy modern elegance and historic charm, complemented by world-class amenities such as rooftop decks with pools, a state-of-the-art fitness centre, coworking spaces, and serene outdoor gardens. Located at 33 Alhambra Circle, Alhambra Parc provides unparalleled access to Coral Gables’ vibrant retail, dining, and cultural scene, just minutes from Miami International Airport, Brickell, and South Beach. With prices starting at $1 million, Alhambra Parc is the epitome of upscale urban living.

## Project Overview

**Year Built:** Estimated completion in 2028

**Number of Units:** 78 luxury residences

**Number of Floors:** 9 levels, including private homes from levels 4 to 9

**Unit Sizes:** 858 to 2,801 square feet

**Bedrooms:** 1 to 3 bedrooms

**Bathrooms:** 1 to 3.5 baths

**Additional Spaces:** 13,000 sq. ft. of office space and 18,000 sq. ft. of retail spacespacious condos, and high-end living spaces.

[Developers](https://alhambraparc-coralgables.com/#team)

[Amenities](https://alhambraparc-coralgables.com/#amenities) [Residences](https://alhambraparc-coralgables.com/#residences)

**Development Team**

**Developers**

MG Developer (led by Alirio and Diego Torrealba) in partnership with Vertical Developments (Fernando De Nuñez Y Lugones).

**Architecture**

Bellin Pratt & Fuentes Architects, renowned for their Mediterranean-style designs.

**Starting Price: $1.1 million**

**Payment Structure:**

20% at contract signing

10% at groundbreaking

10% at top-off

60% at closing

This website is independently operated and has no affiliation with the developer.

This website is a valuable resource and intended for potential buyers.

## Amenities

- Two rooftop decks featuring a pool, spa, and outdoor kitchens
- Paraiso Garden & Yoga Garden for relaxation and wellness
- State-of-the-art fitness center
- Children’s playroom
- Business center with coworking spaces
- Residents’ lounge for social gatherings
- 24/7 concierge service and valet parking
- Amazon package storage
- Backup generator for uninterrupted service
- Third-level parking garage

![Alhambra Parc Coral Gables](https://alhambraparc-coralgables.com/wp-content/uploads/Alhambra-Parc_03.jpg)

[Gallary](https://alhambraparc-coralgables.com/#gallary)[Location](https://alhambraparc-coralgables.com/#location)

[Contact Us for a Price List](https://alhambraparc-coralgables.com/#contact)

![Alhambra Parc Coral Gables](https://alhambraparc-coralgables.com/wp-content/uploads/Alhambra-Parc_02.jpg)

## Residences

Each residence at Alhambra Parc is designed to offer a seamless blend of luxury and functionality. Features include:

- Spacious balconies or terraces
- Porcelain tile flooring
- Premium Italian kitchen cabinetry with quartz countertops
- High-end Subzero Wolf appliances
- Grohe fixtures
- 10-foot ceiling heights

## Iconic Location

Alhambra Parc is at 33 Alhambra Circle, Coral Gables, FL 33134. This prime location offers residents convenient access to the city’s vibrant dining, shopping, and cultural attractions. Situated just minutes from Miracle Mile, residents can enjoy some of the best restaurants, boutiques, and entertainment venues in South Florida. Additionally, the development is only 15 minutes from Miami International Airport, the University of Miami, Brickell, and Downtown Miami, and 20 minutes from South Beach.

![Alhambra Parc Coral Gables](https://alhambraparc-coralgables.com/wp-content/uploads/Alhambra-Parc_location.jpg)

![Alhambra Parc Coral Gables](https://alhambraparc-coralgables.com/wp-content/uploads/Coral-Gables_Miami.jpg)

Coral Gables Miami Neighborhood

## THE NEIGHBORHOOD

Coral Gables is one of Miami’s most prestigious neighborhoods, often called the “Beverly Hills of Miami.” The area is known for its lush tree-lined streets, historic landmarks, and upscale shopping districts. The local real estate market has experienced strong growth, with property values increasing by 8.5% over the past year. As a growing Class A office market, Coral Gables is a sought-after location for professionals looking to live, work, and play within a close-knit radius.

# Alhambra Parc

33 Alhambra Cir Coral Gables FL 33134

Alhambra Parc is an exclusive residential pre-development located in the heart of Coral Gables, Florida. This Mediterranean-style building is designed by Bellin Pratt & Fuentes Architects and developed by MG Developer in partnership with Vertical Developments. The project comprises 78 luxury residences, with one- to three-bedroom options, each thoughtfully designed to blend modern living with the historic charm of Coral Gables. The [Alhambra Parc floor plans](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/alhambra-parc-residences-coral-gables/floor-plans "Alhambra Parc floor plans") range in size from 858 to 2,801 interior square feet with prices starting at $1,000,000.

Each residence at Alhambra Parc features spacious balconies or terraces, porcelain tile flooring, premium Italian kitchen cabinetry with quartz countertops, luxury Sub-Zero Wolf appliances, and high-quality Grohe fixtures. Ceiling heights start at 10 feet, enhancing the sense of space and light at Alhambra Parc. Residents at Alhambra Parc will be able to enjoy a number of luxury amenities, including rooftop decks with a central swimming pool, spa, children’s play area, summer kitchen, state-of-the-art fitness center, outdoor yoga garden, business center, and green spaces.

Additional services at Alhambra include 24/7 concierge service, valet parking, and Amazon package storage. The building also offers nearly 18,000 square feet of ground-floor retail space and 13,000 square feet of office space, providing residents with convenient access to various services and amenities.

Alhambra Parc Residences is located at 33 Alhambra Circle, Coral Gables, FL 33134 in [Coral Gables](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/coral-gables-condos "Coral Gables"), Florida. Residents of Alhambra Parc enjoy an exceptional location, convenient to numerous retail, cafes, shops, and restaurants of Coral Gables and Miracle Mile. Alhambra Parc Residences Coral Gables condominium is 15 minutes from the Miami International Airport, the University of Miami, Brickell, and downtown Miami, and only 20 minutes from South Beach.
